description:
2026 Porsche 911 Carrera 4 GTS Targa, 3.6L TC F6, 532 bhp, 8-Speed Auto PDK AED 939,000 or AED 14,711 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 28 KM's - Porsche Warranty Valid Until May 2028 (Extendable) - Full Service History - Price includes VAT 
 - Oak Green Metallic Neo - Club Leather – Truffle Brown - 20"/21" Carrera Exclusive Design Wheels with Carbon Fiber Blades - Sports Seats Electrical 8-Ways with Memory Package - Sports Tailpipes in Titanium - Exclusive Design Taillights - Adaptive Cruise Control - Heated Seats - Bose Surround Sound System - Carbon Matt Interior Package with Accent in Black - Dashboard Trim and Door Package Leather - Heated GT Sports Steering Wheel Leather with Steering Wheel Panel Carbon Matt - Surround View with Active Parking Support
